name: conditional-get contract: repeated 304 responses never advance the content hash
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --body-hash frozen >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 304 >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 304 >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'h=JSON.parse(File.read("s/aws.json")); STDERR.puts("hash="+h["content_hash"])'
